Short CV

Seda Nur Akyol graduated from Hacettepe Universty School of Medicine in 2007. She worked as      general practitioner between October 2007- May 2008. After completing Histology and Embryology specialty from Gazi University Faculty of Medicine  in 2013, she got the title of specialist physician. She worked as a specialist in Gazi University and Zekai Tahir Burak Women Health Education and Research Hospital. She is a member of Turkish Society of Histology and Embryology.
